Corpse Bride (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,561,149Details
International Box Office $61,324,917
Worldwide Box Office $115,886,066
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $41,928,728
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,398,957
Total $43,327,685
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,145,480 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,204 opening theaters/3,204 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,499,753

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 16th, 2005 (Special Engagement) by Warner Bros.
September 23rd, 2005 (Expands Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: October 13th, 2005 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 20th, 2005 (Wide) (New Zealand)
December 22nd, 2005 (Wide), released as A Noiva Cadáver (Portugal)
May 13th, 2024 (Limited), released as La Sposa Cadavere (Italy)
August 15th, 2024 (Limited) (Re-release) (Mexico)
Video Release: January 31st, 2006 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for some scary images and action, and brief mild language.
Running Time: 76 minutes
Plot point: Arranged Marriage, Friendly Ghost, Romance, Zombies
Subgenre: Kids Horror
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Stop-Motion Animation
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Tim Burton, Laika
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
